projectDescription: An AI-powered career roadmap generator that creates personalized, step-by-step learning plans based on a student's education, skills, interests, and career goals.
keyFeatures: AI-powered personalized career roadmap generation using Groq (Llama 3.3 70B)
Multi-step profile form capturing education level, interests, skills, and career goal
Comprehensive roadmap output: career recommendation, skills, technologies, projects, courses, and phased timeline
Interactive dashboard with bento-grid layout showing salary, job outlook, and reasoning
Curated course recommendations with real URLs from major platforms
Project ideas with difficulty levels and time estimates for portfolio building
Dark neumorphic design with animated UI elements
publicApiSurface: POST /api/generate-roadmap — Generate a personalized career roadmap from a user profile
